creator: rafan@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sun, Mar 04, 2007 at 02:32:07PM +0000, Gerald Pfeifer wrote:
> Looking at the log provided in this PR, the individual object files are
> built with -fpic, but the link (which then fails) is not receiving this
> option.

Could submitter try update gcc42 to latest version and see if 
this problem still happens? I can not reproduce this on 
6.x amd64 with gcc-4.2.0_20070221.
